title: Tengumushi
overview: Bell finds himself resurrected aboard a dragon. He is surrounded by Dragon Dentists — men and women tasked with protecting the dragon’s teeth from cavities as it consumes the souls of its victims in a brutal war between two nations. Though Bell is an enemy to the dentists’ nation, they welcome him. One of the dentists, Nonoko, takes him under her wing.

title: Satsurikumushi
overview: Bell and Nonoko set out to a local airport, from where they will be ferried back to the dragon to return its tooth. Meanwhile, Shibana quietly sets her own plans in motion. Things quickly take a nightmarish turn.
